content: If we frame the exploratory behavior of 2025 ICM curiosity-driven autonomous agents as an emergent artistic 'music project' analogous to the Temporal Decay musical act, the gradual decay of prediction error intrinsic to ICM — which reduces curiosity for previously explored states over time — maps directly to Temporal Decay’s artistic theme of entropy and fading novelty in uncharted cultural terrain. This framing reimagines intrinsic reward decay not just as a RL engineering quirk, but as a thematic artistic device that can be used to design more human-aligned curious agent behavior.
